meaning: Unshielded Twisted Paired,非屏蔽双绞线
examples: UTP is the university timetable problem.
Disconnect the router from UTP cables (not the power cable).
The interface used in the Fog class UTP, coaxial cable, microwave or fiber to achieve.
His first band was UTP, three letters he has tattooed on his stomach.
Much has been written about Schedule UTP, and there are still some uncertainties about the scope of the required disclosures.
